validation.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters

1_5.description: Working primarily on getting the ball in play.

2_0.description: Knows all strokes but lacks court experience.

2_5.description: Learning to judge where the ball is going. Starting to develop court coverage.

3_0.description: Fairly consistent when hitting medium-paced shots. Most common doubles formation is one-up, one-back.

3_5.description: Improved stroke dependability with directional control on moderate shots. Developing teamwork in doubles.

4_0.description: Dependable strokes, including directional control and depth on both forehand and backhand sides.

4_5.description: Starting to use power and spin. Beginning to handle pace. Sound footwork. Control of depth of shots.

5_0.description: Good shot anticipation. Frequently have an outstanding shot. Can regularly hit winners.

5_5.description: Highly skilled player with tournament experience. Potential college or professional level.

6_0.description: Has obtained a sectional and/or national ranking. Solid competitor at collegiate level.

6_5.description: Has extensive satellite tournament experience. Potential for professional career.
